---
title: "Presentation of final projects"
subtitle: "4 May 2026"
format: html
---

## Assignment
- Add the url of your final project to this [GoogleDoc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/13_4VWj6X5-qoBGoaqPs1JqQfV-R7Ugar2uPTAMSo6LE/edit?usp=sharing).

## Presentation of websites
- 10 minutes per student: 5–7 minute presentation with time for questions.
- Presentation should provide overview of website and include ideas for future work.
- Feedback to help completion of project.

## Schedule to turn in final projects
- Presentation on 4 May.
- Final projects and self reflection due by Tuesday, 12 May.
